title: Improved geometrical instrument
abstract: The present invention discloses an instrument which includes a main scale slide rule jacket, a main protractor disc and a V disc. The MSSJ includes a frame enclosing at least some hollow space. One or more main scale is provided with the MSSJ. The MPD is operationally coupled to the MSSJ. The MPD includes an angular scale. The V disc is movably disposed within the MPD. The V disc includes at least one linear edge having a linear Vernier scale and an arc edge having an angular Vernier scale. The linear edge is configured to be used with the one or more main scale of the MSSJ to get a least count of at least one or more decimal places. The arc edge is configured to be used with the angular scale of the MPD to get a least count of at least one or more decimal places.
claims: Claims I CLAIM: 1. An instrument (100) for solving problems of geometry, the instrument (100) comprising: a) a main scale slide rule jacket (110) comprising a frame (110a) enclosing at least some hollow space, b) one or more main scale (111) provided in the hollow space of the main scale slide rule jacket (110); c) a main protractor disc (130) operationally coupled to the main scale slide rule jacket (110), the main protractor disc (130) including an angular scale (133); and d) a V disc (150) movably disposed within the main protractor disc (130), the V disc (150) including at least one linear edge (151) and an arc edge (153), the linear edge (151) having a linear Vernier scale while the arc edge (153) having an angular Vernier scale; wherein the linear edge (151) is configured to be used with the one or more main scale (111) of the main scale slide rule jacket (110) to get a least count of at least one or more decimal places; wherein the arc edge (153) is configured to be used with the angular scale (133) of the main protractor disc (130) to get a least count of at least one or more decimal places. 2. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein an upper half (110b) of the main scale slide rule jacket (110) is hollow. 3. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the main scale slide rule jacket (110) includes one or more grooves (113) disposed along its one or more edges. 4. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 3, wherein the main protractor disc (130) is slidably and/or rotatably coupled within the grooves (113) of the main scale slide rule jacket (110). 5. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the main protractor disc (130) is ring shaped. 6. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the angular scale (133) of the main protractor disc (130) ranges in one or both of a clockwise and an anti-clockwise direction. 7. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the main protractor disc (130) includes an outer thickness greater than an inner thickness such that it creates a step (135). 8. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 7, wherein the V disc (150) is movably disposed over the step (135) of the main protractor disc (130). 9. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the V disc (150) is encircled with a circular ring. 10. The instrument (100) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the V disc (150) includes an interfacing edge (155) which enable an user to easily rotate the V disc (150) within the main protractor disc (130).
